name: solc-version
text:
Version constraint ^0.8.19 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.19 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)

	- (success,None) = address(winner).call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#376)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- pool.winnersCount ++ (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#382)

	- FinancialPoolManager._selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#333-391)
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#188-205)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#149-182)
